name: Honey Carrot Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar and butter. Beat well.
3. Add eggs, honey, and vanilla. Beat until well mixed.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, nutmeg, and salt. Stir dry ingredients into the butter mixture; mix well.
5. Stir in shredded carrots.
6. Using well-floured hands, shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 13 to 18 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
9. Remove immediately to wire racks and cool.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
